summary: Add a wildcard-aware assetInScope(asset, scope) helper used by the guarded report-submission path and refer to it from report_submit.go.
reason: report_submit.go called an assetInScope helper that was never defined, so the package did not compile. The previous strings.Contains-based check matched only exact substrings, so a wildcard scope like *.example.com never matched a concrete asset like api.example.com.
validated_outcome: go build ./... passes; api.example.com matches *.example.com, example.com matches *.example.com, and unrelated assets are rejected.
